title: Queen Full Field RTX — no vendor drivers forever (doctrine)
motto: SPIR-V stable ABI. FieldGpuDispatch owns the card. libvulkan retires.
doctrine: Queen holds the field GPU path: one SPIR-V stack for NVIDIA RTX, Intel Arc LE, and AMD. Vendor kernel drivers are a bootstrap bridge only — FieldGpuDispatch + FieldSurface replace libvulkan and SDL3 as the chip layer matures. Operator sets QUEEN_FIELD_GPU=1; gate field_gpu_dispatch is held forever.
kilroy_vulkan: profile name only — KILROY kernel has no libvulkan; war mode uses g16 vulkan_rtx compile profile

now.gpu: Vulkan bridge (FieldGpuDispatch::VulkanBridge) — minimal loader to submit SPIR-V
now.shaders: retired — CHIPS/cores route through Queen Webbrowser (no desktop comp shader boot)

forever.gpu: FieldGpuDispatch pure — direct field socket to RTX without libvulkan
forever.surface: FieldSurface pure — in-engine framebuffer, no OS compositor hook
forever.drivers: none required on operator OS — Queen exe carries field layer

note: Today queen-browser still links Vulkan for bootstrap; doctrine and gates are held — pure field path is the retirement target, not optional.
